versions.version_description: Simpler version, Good for acoustic version, Added Capo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I do my hair toss, check my nails[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Baby how you feelin'? (Feelin' good as hell)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Hair toss, check my nails[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Baby how you feelin'? (Feelin' good as hell)[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Woo child, tired of the bullshit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Go on dust your shoulders off, keep it moving[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Yes, Lord, tryna get some new shit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                       [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
Come now, come dry your eyes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm[/ch]
You know you a star, you can touch the sky[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Eb/G[/ch]
I know that it's hard but you have to try[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fm[/ch]
If you need advice, let me simplify[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Eb/G[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]
If he don't love you anymore[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Eb/G[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
